items.title: Amazon GameLift Streams introduces secure terminal access for stream sessions

items.title: Amazon EMR Serverless now supports larger worker sizes to run more compute and memory intensive workloads
items.snippet: Amazon EMR Serverless now offers larger worker configurations of 32 vCPUs with up to 244 GB of memory, allowing you to run more compute and memory-intensive workloads. Previously, the largest worker configuration available on EMR Serverless was 16 vCPUs with…
